privileged_info_summary: The environment uses a synthetic dataset. The task requires the agent to log 3.5 hours on the 'Implement biometric login (Face ID / Fingerprint)' work package in the 'Mobile Banking App' project. The time entry must include the comment 'Completed Face ID integration for iOS, testing in progress.' and be dated with today's date. The setup script automatically discovers the work package ID for 'biometric login' in the 'mobile-banking-app' project and directly navigates the browser to its activity page.
